summary: Nice FM broadcast of a great Spring ’90 show featuring an outstanding Foolish Heart, with clear sound quality.
review: The recording is a true FM (matrix) source that upgrades the old cassette copy and delivers a clean, listenable mix. The concert itself is praised as a great Spring‑1990 performance, highlighted by one of the best pre‑drums “Foolish Heart” moments ever heard.

ai_rating.rationale: The single detailed review is strongly positive about both performance and sound quality, suggesting a high‑scoring show with a good recording; however confidence is limited by the small sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: True FM broadcast source; clearer and better than an old cassette copy, no noted dropouts or major flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong pre‑drums segment and overall great Spring ’90 performance; the show flows well and is considered a highlight of that tour.
